news.title:
Nifty surged 3.78% to close near 23,997 after a ceasefire in West Asia boosted sentiments.
Shriram Finance and Adani Enterprises led gains; Nifty Auto and Realty rose over 6% each.
news.summary:
Nifty surged 3.78% to close near 23,997 after a ceasefire in West Asia boosted sentiments.
Shriram Finance and Adani Enterprises led gains; Nifty Auto and Realty rose over 6% each.

news.title:
MUFGBank acquired 4.71 Cr shares (20%) of Shriram Finance via preferential allotment.
Shares priced at ₹840.93 each; post-acquisition total equity capital is ₹4705.4 Cr.
news.summary:
MUFGBank acquired 4.71 Cr shares (20%) of Shriram Finance via preferential allotment.
Shares priced at ₹840.93 each; post-acquisition total equity capital is ₹4705.4 Cr.

news.title:
MUFG acquires 20% stake in Shriram Finance for ₹39,618 cr, marking India's largest cross-border financial deal.
Shriram Finance aims to scale operations post-investment, focusing on underserved markets and adopting global risk practices.
news.summary:
MUFG acquires 20% stake in Shriram Finance for ₹39,618 cr, marking India's largest cross-border financial deal.
Shriram Finance aims to scale operations post-investment, focusing on underserved markets and adopting global risk practices.

news.title:
Shriram Finance sees 10.0% surge in open interest with strong price gains.
Elevated volumes and bullish momentum suggest heightened investor positioning.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance sees 10.0% surge in open interest with strong price gains.
Elevated volumes and bullish momentum suggest heightened investor positioning.

news.title:
Shriram Finance saw an NSE block trade of 407,340 shares worth Rs. 41.75 crore.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,024.95 per share.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance saw an NSE block trade of 407,340 shares worth Rs. 41.75 crore.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,024.95 per share.

news.title: Shriram Finance allotted 47.1 Cr shares to MUFG Bank at ₹840.93 via preferential sale.
news.summary: Shriram Finance allotted 47.1 Cr shares to MUFG Bank at ₹840.93 via preferential sale.

news.title:
Shriram Finance approves allotment of 47.1 Cr equity shares to MUFG Bank at Rs.840.93/share.
The issuance raises Rs.39,617.9 Cr, increasing paid-up equity capital to Rs.470.5 Cr.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance approves allotment of 47.1 Cr equity shares to MUFG Bank at Rs.840.93/share.
The issuance raises Rs.39,617.9 Cr, increasing paid-up equity capital to Rs.470.5 Cr.

news.title:
Shriram Finance rose 3.6%, hitting Rs 921.95, outperforming Sensex's 0.7% gain.
It outpaced NBFC peers by 1.5%, signaling stock-specific strength.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance rose 3.6%, hitting Rs 921.95, outperforming Sensex's 0.7% gain.
It outpaced NBFC peers by 1.5%, signaling stock-specific strength.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.

news.title:
Antique initiates 'Buy' on Shriram Finance, sees 28% upside with a FY28 target of ₹1,150, citing scalable growth and strong asset quality.
Shriram Finance's diversified portfolio, stable margins, and improved asset quality post-merger drive bullish outlook despite near-term risks.
news.summary:
Antique initiates 'Buy' on Shriram Finance, sees 28% upside with a FY28 target of ₹1,150, citing scalable growth and strong asset quality.
Shriram Finance's diversified portfolio, stable margins, and improved asset quality post-merger drive bullish outlook despite near-term risks.

news.title:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.
news.summary:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.

news.title:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.
news.summary:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.

news.title:
Shriram Finance Ltd trades at P/E of 18.6 vs industry 19.55.
Despite price pressures and mojo rating downgrade, it remains a Nifty 50 constituent.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance Ltd trades at P/E of 18.6 vs industry 19.55.
Despite price pressures and mojo rating downgrade, it remains a Nifty 50 constituent.

news.title:
Shriram Finance declined 3.9% to Rs.904.15, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Volatility driven by intraday swings, rising derivatives interest, and mixed technical signals.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance declined 3.9% to Rs.904.15, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Volatility driven by intraday swings, rising derivatives interest, and mixed technical signals.

news.title:
Shriram Finance sees sharp OI surge on 27 Mar 2026 amid market downturn.
Heightened investor activity signals directional bets in NBFC sector.
news.summary:

news.title:
MUFG Bank gets CCI approval for proposed investment in Shriram Finance.
Transaction involves issuance of 47.1 Cr equity shares via preferential issue.
news.summary:

news.title:
Shriram Finance's OI in derivatives rose 11.7%, indicating strong market activity.
Despite the OI surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance's OI in derivatives rose 11.7%, indicating strong market activity.

news.title:
Shriram Finance shares fell 7%, marking the sharpest drop since June 2024, leading Nifty 50 losses.
Macquarie suggests new regulatory norms for NBFCs may impact Shriram Finance and Bajaj Finance significantly.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance shares fell 7%, marking the sharpest drop since June 2024, leading Nifty 50 losses.
Macquarie suggests new regulatory norms for NBFCs may impact Shriram Finance and Bajaj Finance significantly.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,632.4 points (-2.1%) to 75,071.7; Nifty shed 515.6 points (-2.2%) to 23,262.2, driven by global tensions.
ONGC (+1.4%) and Coal India (+0.6%) gained, while Shriram Finance (-5.7%) led declines. Rupee hit record low at 92.5/USD.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 1,632.4 points (-2.1%) to 75,071.7; Nifty shed 515.6 points (-2.2%) to 23,262.2, driven by global tensions.
ONGC (+1.4%) and Coal India (+0.6%) gained, while Shriram Finance (-5.7%) led declines. Rupee hit record low at 92.5/USD.
